universities.name: Kwame Nkrumah University of Science and Technology
universities.description: Ghana's premier science and technology university, known for engineering, medicine, and innovative research.
requirements: Pass WASSCE with Aggregate 12 or better
Minimum B3 in Core Mathematics, English, and Science
Minimum C6 in three elective subjects
universities.admission_info: Applications open in January. Deadline is March 31st. Visit the university website for detailed requirements.

universities.name: University of Ghana
universities.description: Ghana's oldest and largest university, offering comprehensive programs across all disciplines.
requirements: Pass WASSCE with Aggregate 14 or better
Minimum C6 in Core Mathematics, English, and Science
Minimum C6 in three elective subjects
universities.admission_info: Applications open in January. Deadline is March 31st. Check the UG admissions portal for updates.

universities.name: University of Mines and Technology
universities.description: Ghana's premier university for mining, geology, and engineering education.
requirements: Pass WASSCE with Aggregate 16 or better
Minimum C6 in Core Mathematics, English, and Science
Minimum C6 in three elective subjects
universities.admission_info: Applications open in January. Deadline is March 31st. Special consideration for female applicants.

universities.name: University of Cape Coast
universities.description: A leading university known for teacher training, arts, and social sciences education.
requirements: Pass WASSCE with Aggregate 15 or better
Minimum C6 in Core Mathematics, English, and Science
Minimum C6 in three elective subjects
universities.admission_info: Applications open in January. Deadline is March 31st. Teacher training programs have specific requirements.
